subcodes.title: The Imprisonment of ‘Abdu’l-Bahá: Words spoken on 1911-10-25 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I regret much that I have kept you waiting this morning, but I have so much to do in a short time
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @suffering and imprisonment, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
